archetype: Archetype 6: Vibrant Play (Adapted with Soft SaaS features)
design_philosophy: Modern, friendly, and motivational. The interface relies on clean, card-based layouts with generous rounded corners and subtle shadows. The color palette provides energetic pops of Indigo, Emerald, and Amber over a soft, neutral Light Gray background, creating a playful yet professional space for networking.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Elements should breathe to feel approachable and less overwhelming.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4F46E5] text-white hover:bg-[#4338CA] rounded-xl sm:rounded-full font-semibold transition-all shadow-sm shadow-[#4F46E5]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-xl sm:rounded-full font-semibold transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-[#FBBF24] text-white hover:bg-[#F59E0B] rounded-xl sm:rounded-full font-semibold transition-all shadow-sm shadow-[#FBBF24]/20

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl sm:rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 transition-all hover:shadow-md hover:border-gray-200
cards.challenge_card: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border-l-4 border-[#FBBF24] shadow-sm
cards.match_card: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border-l-4 border-[#4F46E5] shadow-sm

badges.skill: px-3 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-[#4B5563] rounded-full text-sm font-medium
badges.achievement: px-3 py-1 bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] rounded-full text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5
badges.notification: px-3 py-1 bg-[#FBBF24]/10 text-[#D97706] rounded-full text-sm font-semibold

inputs.base: w-full rounded-xl border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:border-[#4F46E5] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4F46E5]/20 outline-none transition-all

motion_and_interaction.staggered_list: Use Framer Motion to stagger card appearances (e.g., matching skills list)
motion_and_interaction.page_transition: Fade in with a slight upward motion

onboarding.layout: Centered form within a large soft card, step-by-step progressive disclosure.
onboarding.visuals: Animated card transitions, large avatar upload circle.

dashboard.layout: Bento-style grid. 1 column on mobile, 3 columns on desktop (Main feed 2 cols, Sidebar 1 col).

match_details.header: Large profile presentation, complementary skills side-by-side comparison.
match_details.actions: Sticky bottom bar on mobile with 'Start Collaboration' (#4F46E5).
match_details.conversation_starters: Clickable chat bubbles that copy to clipboard, with a subtle success toast.

icons.style: stroke-width: 2 or 2.5 for a bolder, friendlier look.

avatars.description: Smiling woman in park, user profile 3

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react if not already present.
Use Shadcn UI components but override their default square/sharp corners with 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-xl' to match the friendly theme.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the #F3F4F6 background and #FFFFFF surfaces.
Apply `tracking-tight` to all headings (Inter bold) to give them a premium, modern feel.
For the onboarding background, strictly use the gradient: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F3F4F6] to-[#EFF6FF].
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
